message:
feat(store+command): HEXPIRE/HPEXPIRE/HEXPIREAT/HPEXPIREAT/HPERSIST keyspace events (br-frankenredis-7jhg, rv89 part 4b)

Wires upstream-matching NOTIFY_HASH keyspace events into the per-field
TTL set/persist path:

- fr-store: hash_field_set_abs_expiry_with_event(key, field, at, cond,
  now, event) — wraps the existing set primitive and fires the event
  on Applied + AppliedAlreadyExpired; ConditionNotMet / missing /
  WrongType stay silent (matches upstream behaviour).
- fr-store: hash_field_persist_with_event(key, field) — fires "hpersist"
  only on the Persisted branch; NoTtl stays silent.
- fr-command: hexpire_cmd maps (form, absolute) to
  "hexpire"/"hpexpire"/"hexpireat"/"hpexpireat" and routes through the
  _with_event variant.
- fr-command: hpersist_cmd routes through the _with_event variant.

5 new tests added (30 total in hash_field_ttl.rs):
- applied → "hexpire" in both __keyspace__ and __keyevent__ channels
- already-expired deadline still emits (upstream matches)
- condition-blocked sets emit no event
- persist emits "hpersist" on clear
- persist on a field with no TTL emits no event

fr-store 25/0 + 30/0 hash_field_ttl; fr-command 619/0; workspace clippy
clean.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
